name: Effaclar Purifying Foaming Gel
hero: LRP's foaming gel for oily and acne-prone skin: trace salicylic acid, zinc PCA, thermal-water carrier. Cleans deeper than Cetaphil without the post-wash tightness most acne cleansers leave behind.

scoreBreakdown.n: Mild surfactant blend; just below CeraVe Foaming on dryness.
Trace SA + zinc PCA give a real (small) anti-comedonal nudge.
₹ 1,150 is steep; CeraVe Foaming costs ~20% less.

ingredients.note: At rinse-off dose, modest but real.
Small effect; valuable for combination skin.

useCases.b: PM cleanse before adapalene or BPO. Sets a clean canvas.
Daily AM workhorse — cuts overnight sebum without stripping.
After clay or sulfur masks, restores skin neutral without re-strip.

alts.name: Foaming Facial Cleanser
alts.note: Cheaper; no SA. Same gentleness profile.

faq.q: Is the salicylic acid actually working?
faq.a: At rinse-off contact-time of 30-60 seconds, expect a 5-10% adjunctive benefit on comedone counts vs a placebo wash. The leave-on Paula's Choice 2% BHA is the actual treatment.

faq.q: Will it irritate skin already on tretinoin?
faq.a: Usually no — but if you're 4-6 weeks into tret and peeling, switch to Toleriane Hydrating for a fortnight, then return.

faq.q: Effaclar Gel vs Effaclar Duo — same family?
faq.a: Same family; gel is the cleanser, Duo is the leave-on treatment. Use them together, not one or the other.
Yes — SA is rinse-off and at trace dose. Far below systemic-absorption thresholds. Dermatology pregnancy guidelines list rinse-off SA cleansers as acceptable.

sources.n: Kornhauser A et al. Salicylic acid in acne. Cosm Toiletries 2011.
Kligman AM, Mills OH. Acne cosmetica and acne mechanica. JAAD 1972.
Chularojanamontri L et al. Moisturizers for acne. Indian J Dermatol 2014.
LRP Effaclar dossier, in vivo seborrhea data. 2022.
